notes: Audi A8 2000-2024: Comprehensive trim/tire data from tiresize.com
Audi Allroad 2001-2016: Two generations - original (2001-2005) and A4 Allroad (2013-2016)
Audi Cabriolet 2000: Model discontinued after 1998 - invalid year
Audi e-tron 2019-2023: GT and GT RS trims feature staggered setups
Audi e-tron S 2020-2023: High-performance variant with larger wheel options
Audi Q2L e-tron 2019-2023: China market only, limited data available
Audi Q3 2011-2026: US sales began 2015, earlier years European only
Audi Q5 2017-2026: Consistent trim structure Premium/Premium Plus/Prestige
